name: Entrada Therapeutics, Inc.
business: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company aiming to transform the lives of patients by establishing a new class of medicines that engage intracellular targets that have long been considered inaccessible. Through proprietary, versatile and modular approaches, we are advancing a robust development portfolio of genetic medicines for the potential treatment of neuromuscular and inherited retinal diseases, among others.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company aiming to transform the lives of patients by establishing a new class of medicines that engage intracellular targets that have long been considered inaccessible.

catalysts.event: Report data from Cohort 1 of ELEVATE-44-201 (6 mg/kg)
catalysts.sentence: The Company is on track to report data from Cohort 1 (6 mg/kg) in the second quarter of 2026

catalysts.event: Report data from Cohort 2 of ELEVATE-44-201 (12 mg/kg)
catalysts.sentence: data from Cohort 2 (12 mg/kg) by year-end

catalysts.event: Report data from Cohort 1 of ELEVATE-45-201 (5 mg/kg)
catalysts.sentence: The Company is on track to report data from Cohort 1 (5 mg/kg) in mid-2026

catalysts.event: Complete enrollment and dosing of VX-670 MAD trial
catalysts.sentence: Vertex has announced that it is on track to complete enrollment and dosing in the trial in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: Submit EU regulatory applications for ENTR-601-50 clinical trial
catalysts.sentence: The Company expects to submit regulatory applications and obtain authorization in the EU for ENTR-601-50 by year-end 2026.

catalysts.event: Submit global regulatory filings for ENTR-601-51 clinical trials
catalysts.sentence: We expect to submit global regulatory filings for ENTR-601-51 in 2026.
The Company plans to announce a second clinical candidate in ocular diseases in the second half of 2026

tamClaims.claim: Over 11,500 patients in the U.S. and Europe with mutations amenable to Entrada's current exon skipping programs.
tamClaims.sentence: When combined, we estimate that there are over 11,500 patients in the U.S. and Europe that carry mutations amenable to Entrada's current exon skipping programs.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 14,000-15,000 people in the U.S. and Europe with USH2A amenable to exon 13 skipping.
tamClaims.sentence: In the U.S. and Europe, we estimate that approximately 14,000-15,000 people are living with USH2A who may be amenable to exon 13 skipping.

tamClaims.claim: DMD occurs in approximately one in every 3,500 to 5,000 live male births, with about 41,000 patients in the U.S. and Europe.
tamClaims.sentence: We estimate that DMD occurs in approximately one in every 3,500 to 5,000 live male births and that the patient population is approximately 41,000 patients in the aggregate in the U.S. and Europe.

tamClaims.claim: DM1 affects approximately 110,000 people in the U.S. and Europe.
tamClaims.sentence: DM1 is commonly estimated to affect approximately 110,000 people in the U.S. and Europe.
